title: Limited Editon LP release of NGE Soundtrack
display_title: Limited Editon LP release of NGE Soundtrack
wikitext:
[]: Limited Editon LP release of NGE Soundtrack             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 22, 2015 8:56 pm Something else for folks to pre-order at CDJapan, etc: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Mon Jun 22, 2015 11:24 pm Interesting. My family got a bunch of LPs from my late uncle and we're thinking about getting a 3 in 1 or 5 in 1 system (tell me if these systems are any good) to play them, so this might be worth it.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Jun 23, 2015 12:18 am I've got a modern record player at home, along with a Victrola. The Victrola can't play this, that's for sure (learned that the hard way when I destroyed a record of Leftoverture) but I'd be interested to have Eva stuff on Vinyl even if only for the novelty value.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 26, 2015 11:03 pm Track list! 23 tracks, 2 LPs. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Fri Jun 26, 2015 11:25 pm Looking at the wiki, it appears that this is just a version of the first of the first OST, just in LP. Still haven't decided if this is worth gettting.
